schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: OxyDex single-night SpO₂/oximetry summary computed headless from a SignalFrame(spo2). Emits ganglior_events[] (desat_event from desatProfile + periodic_breathing from oscillation episodes); OxyDex infers respiration from an SpO₂ proxy, not airflow. tMs = floating wall-clock ms (UTC getters); null = unknown, never fabricated.

timeseries.doc: 5-min epochs — cross-node feed for three-cornered-hat: hr = median pulse-HR (bpm), motionIndex = mean O2Ring motion count. HR-hat 3rd corner (ECG+PPG+Oxy) + a 2nd per-epoch motion series for the correlated-TCH ρ.

summary.impression: Moderate burden: SBII 33.115 %²·min/hr, hypoxic load 14.096; CS pattern likely — review CPAP pressure.

vo2est.dfaNote: DFA α1 computed on SpO₂ (not HR) — SpO₂ DFA is always >1.0 at short scales; HR-DFA sedentary thresholds do not apply. Adjustment disabled.
vo2est.label: Top-25% for age 49
vo2est.disclaimer: Surrogate estimate ±10.8 ml/kg/min SEE (general pop.) · ±5.4 for trained athletes. Trend tracking only.

z2.name: Z2 Aerobic Base
z2.purpose: Fat oxidation, base fitness, Zone 2 training

allZones.name: Z2 Aerobic Base
allZones.purpose: Fat oxidation, base fitness, Zone 2 training

karv.trainingNote: Rest or active recovery walk only. Training will deepen deficit.
karv.lthrNote: Zone 4 top ≈ LTHR. Confirm with field test (30-min max effort, avg last 20 min).

dfa.dfaLabel: SpO₂ DFA (α1=1.649) — HR-DFA thresholds do not apply to SpO₂ signal
